column1: # Example of comments. Here we can define global variables, snippets and spritesheets
## in this line goes some aux cells (for reference from dataset)->
# Next line defines the headers of the CSV, where we define the IDs of the template to change in every card
{A4 b=[-10]}.L{p=0x0 g=[0 0] shape=miniEuro}.M{path1251 l=[3 2] b=0 d=2}
